import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let a = parse_ints(line1)
    let b = parse_ints(line2)
    let total = a.len()
    mut i = 0
    while i < total
      match a.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        match b.get(i)
        when Some(y)
          println("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
